triggers.name: Kick
triggers.comments: Verified in Legends log: 'You kick Asaka L`Rei for 22 points of damage.' + crit form '... (Critical)'. Default ON per user request — note this is high-frequency (fires every combat round, 1208x in the audit fixture); toggle off in the UI if it's too spammy. Replaces the old built-in Skill:Kick alert (skillSpellForVerb).

triggers.name: Bash
triggers.comments: Shield bash (warrior/paladin/SK/cleric). Default ON so every damaging combat skill reports its damage through the same Alerts overlay contract.

triggers.name: Slam
triggers.comments: Racial slam (ogre/etc.). Default ON so every damaging combat skill reports its damage through the same Alerts overlay contract.

triggers.name: Cleave
triggers.comments: Warrior Cleave. Included with the maintained learned-skill catalog and routed through the shared skill-damage presentation.

triggers.name: Backstab
triggers.comments: Rogue Backstab. This is the single presentation owner for Backstab hits; the legacy class-specific duplicate was removed.

triggers.name: Eagle Strike
triggers.pattern: ^You eagle strike .+? for (\d+) points? of damage\.(?: \([^)]+\))?$
triggers.comments: Monk special. Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map.

triggers.name: Tiger Claw
triggers.pattern: ^You tiger claw .+? for (\d+) points? of damage\.(?: \([^)]+\))?$
triggers.comments: Monk special. Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map.

triggers.name: Dragon Punch
triggers.pattern: ^You dragon punch .+? for (\d+) points? of damage\.(?: \([^)]+\))?$
triggers.comments: Monk special (a.k.a. Tail Rake for iksar). Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map.

triggers.name: Tail Rake
triggers.pattern: ^You tail rake .+? for (\d+) points? of damage\.(?: \([^)]+\))?$
triggers.comments: Iksar-monk variant of Dragon Punch. Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map.

triggers.name: Flying Kick
triggers.pattern: ^You flying kick .+? for (\d+) points? of damage\.(?: \([^)]+\))?$
triggers.comments: Monk high-tier kick. Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map.

triggers.name: Round Kick
triggers.pattern: ^You round kick .+? for (\d+) points? of damage\.(?: \([^)]+\))?$
triggers.comments: Monk mid-tier kick. Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map.

triggers.name: Frenzy
triggers.pattern: ^You frenzy on .+? for (\d+) points? of damage\.(?: \([^)]+\))?$
triggers.comments: Berserker Frenzy. Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map ('frenzy on').

triggers.name: Smite
triggers.comments: Line format modeled on the verified kick line; verb from the old built-in skillSpellForVerb map.

triggers.name: Reave
triggers.comments: Verified in Legends log: 'You reave a Teir`Dal ranger for 135 points of damage.' Default ON — preserves the prior built-in Skill:Reave behavior; toggle off in the UI per taste. Replaces the old hardcoded Skill:Reave alert in FightsTab.tsx.
